'''鈭歞-d-ng-r''' ('''kadadngeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monasticize|monasticize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-d-ng-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monasticize|monasticize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-d-ng-r
|-
! Lemma
| kadadngeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidadngeroko|thidadngeroko]] || [[word:jidadngeroko|jidadngeroko]] || [[word:shidadngeroko|shidadngeroko]] || [[word:kidadngeroko|kidadngeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudadngeroko|thuthudadngeroko]] || [[word:jujudadngeroko|jujudadngeroko]] || [[word:shushudadngeroko|shushudadngeroko]] || [[word:kukudadngeroko|kukudadngeroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodadngeroko|thodadngeroko]] || [[word:jodadngeroko|jodadngeroko]] || [[word:shodadngeroko|shodadngeroko]] || [[word:kodadngeroko|kodadngeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dadngeroko|th忙dadngeroko]] || [[word:j忙dadngeroko|j忙dadngeroko]] || [[word:sh忙dadngeroko|sh忙dadngeroko]] || [[word:k忙dadngeroko|k忙dadngeroko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadadngeroko|thadadngeroko]] || [[word:jadadngeroko|jadadngeroko]] || [[word:shadadngeroko|shadadngeroko]] || [[word:kadadngeroko|kadadngeroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
